/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/AccidentalVisibilityTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/BorrowedChordAnalysisTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/ChordRecognizerTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/CommandStackTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/CustomScaleBuilderTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/HarmonicContextResolverTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/HarmonicOverlayTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/LoggerTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/MidiExporterTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/PlaceholderTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/PitchModelTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/ProjectModelTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/ProjectSerializationTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/RecordingInputTransformTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/ScaleLibraryTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsq_core_tests.dir/core/TimeModelTest.cpp.o -o tsq_core_tests  ../src/core/libtsq_core.a ../_deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2Maind.a ../_deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2d.a
